languages.text: {n}Презрение, которое читается в обращенном на вас взгляде, красноречивее любого ответа. Ювенна молча смотрит на вас, словно на одет{mf|ого|ую} в вонючие лохмотья городск{mf|ого|ую} сумасшедш{mf|его|ую}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Презрение, которое читается в обращенном на вас взгляде, красноречивее любого ответа. Ювенна молча смотрит на вас, словно на одет{mf|ого|ую} в вонючие лохмотья городск{mf|ого|ую} сумасшедш{mf|его|ую}.{/n}
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: {n}The disdain in her eyes speaks more eloquently than any direct answer. Juvenna stares at you in silence, as if you were dressed in the fetid rags of a raving vagrant.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Презрение, которое читается в обращенном на вас взгляде, красноречивее любого ответа. Ювенна молча смотрит на вас, словно на одет{mf|ого|ую} в вонючие лохмотья городск{mf|ого|ую} сумасшедш{mf|его|ую}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The disdain in her eyes speaks more eloquently than any direct answer. Juvenna stares at you in silence, as if you were dressed in the fetid rags of a raving vagrant.{/n}
{n}The disdain in her eyes speaks more eloquently than any direct answer. Juvenna stares at you in silence, as if you were dressed in the fetid rags of a raving vagrant.{/n}
{n}The disdain in her eyes speaks more eloquently than any direct answer. Juvenna stares at you in silence, as if you were dressed in the fetid rags of a raving vagrant.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El desdén de su mirada es más elocuente que ninguna respuesta. Juvenna te mira en silencio como su vistieras los harapos fétidos de un indigente loco.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disdain in her eyes speaks more eloquently than any direct answer. Juvenna stares at you in silence, as if you were dressed in the fetid rags of a raving vagrant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El desdén de su mirada es más elocuente que ninguna respuesta. Juvenna te mira en silencio como su vistieras los harapos fétidos de un indigente loco.{/n}

languages.text: {n}她眼中的轻蔑比任何直接的回答都更有力。尤文娜沉默地注视着你，仿佛你穿着疯癫流浪者的恶臭烂衣。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disdain in her eyes speaks more eloquently than any direct answer. Juvenna stares at you in silence, as if you were dressed in the fetid rags of a raving vagrant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}她眼中的轻蔑比任何直接的回答都更有力。尤文娜沉默地注视着你，仿佛你穿着疯癫流浪者的恶臭烂衣。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le mépris que vous décelez dans son regard en dit plus long que n'importe quelle réponse directe. Elle vous observe en silence, comme si vous étiez {mf|affublé|affublée} des oripeaux fétides d'{mf|un vagabond délirant|une vagabonde délirante}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disdain in her eyes speaks more eloquently than any direct answer. Juvenna stares at you in silence, as if you were dressed in the fetid rags of a raving vagrant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le mépris que vous décelez dans son regard en dit plus long que n'importe quelle réponse directe. Elle vous observe en silence, comme si vous étiez {mf|affublé|affublée} des oripeaux fétides d'{mf|un vagabond délirant|une vagabonde délirante}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Gözlerindeki küçümseme, her türlü doğrudan cevaptan daha etkili bir şekilde konuşuyor. Juvenna, sanki çılgın bir serserinin iğrenç paçavralarını giyiyormuşsun gibi sessizce sana bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disdain in her eyes speaks more eloquently than any direct answer. Juvenna stares at you in silence, as if you were dressed in the fetid rags of a raving vagrant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Gözlerindeki küçümseme, her türlü doğrudan cevaptan daha etkili bir şekilde konuşuyor. Juvenna, sanki çılgın bir serserinin iğrenç paçavralarını giyiyormuşsun gibi sessizce sana bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Geringschätzung in ihren Augen sagt mehr als tausend Worte. Juvenna starrt dich schweigend an, als wärst du in die schmutzigen Lumpen eines Landstreichers gehüllt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disdain in her eyes speaks more eloquently than any direct answer. Juvenna stares at you in silence, as if you were dressed in the fetid rags of a raving vagrant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Geringschätzung in ihren Augen sagt mehr als tausend Worte. Juvenna starrt dich schweigend an, als wärst du in die schmutzigen Lumpen eines Landstreichers gehüllt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}彼女の目は、どんな直接的な答えよりも、あなたの無礼を鋭く見抜いている。ユベナは、狂った放浪者のような汚れた衣服を着ているかのように、あなたをじっと見つめている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disdain in her eyes speaks more eloquently than any direct answer. Juvenna stares at you in silence, as if you were dressed in the fetid rags of a raving vagrant.{/n}
